title: sideritis × paui subsp. tomas-barberanii
intro: Sideritis × paui subsp. tomas-barberanii, also known as Spanish ironwort, is a plant species endemic to the Mediterranean region, specifically found in the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Spanish ironwort include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation and pain, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
